title: Interpol’s most wanted: German national arrested at OR Tambo
description: NATIONAL NEWS - A German national, listed on...
bodyText:
NATIONAL NEWS - A German national, listed on Interpol’s most wanted list for alleged drug trafficking, was arrested during a routine border operation at OR Tambo International Airport on Friday.


> According to South Africa’s Border Management Authority (BMA), the man had evaded arrest for eight years.


He was travelling on a fraudulent Israeli passport, which raised suspicions among BMA officials due to his German accent.

Read the full story on The Witness.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
